text: <speak>Le montant de votre facture la plus récente était de $session.params.api.billingProfile.lastPaymentDetails.lastInvoiceAmount $ en date du <say-as interpret-as="date" format="md">$session.params.api.billingProfile.playAccountBalanceDates.playlastBillingDate</say-as>.</speak>

<speak>The amount on your most recent bill was $ $session.params.api.billingProfile.lastPaymentDetails.lastInvoiceAmount dated <say-as interpret-as="date" format="md"> $session.params.api.billingProfile.playAccountBalanceDates.playlastBillingDate</say-as>.</speak>
